headline: Is It Time To Revisit Conagra Brands (CAG) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Conagra Brands at around US$18.85 is starting to look like value, you are not alone and that is exactly what this article will unpack. The stock has returned 1.0% over the past week and 2.6% over the last month, with a 9.0% return year to date but a 20.2% decline over the past year and deeper falls over 3 and 5 years. These mixed returns have kept investors focused on what is really priced into Conagra Brands today and whether recent sentiment shifts are...

headline: Campbell's Q2 Earnings on the Horizon: What Should Investors Expect?
summary: CPB heads into Q2 with expected sales and profit declines as snack softness, divestitures and rising costs bite.

headline: The challenger brands eating Big Food’s lunch
summary: Insurgent brands such as LesserEvil, Chomps and Kodiak drove 25% of growth in the food sector in 2025, according to Bain & Company.
